title: Better Mob Combat Neo
description: a unoffical port of the mod Better Mob Combat
body:
An Unoffical Neoforge port of the mod [Better mob Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mob-combat)
All rights go to the original owner of this mod.     

Credits to Guy21 for help porting the mod to neoforge 1.21.1

There is currently a new [Discord](https://discord.gg/SZPC6P8Y6z)   made where you can report any bugs! 
_______________________________________________________________________________________________



Addon for [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) that allows it to work with (humanoid) mobs. 
It will ensure the animations work properly when used with other player animation resource packs or mods by replacing the arms with Better Combat's animations.

**However** this mod makes no changes to the original mod and is designed to be a neoforge mod ported to 1.21.1
     
Requires [Mob Player animator neo](https://modrinth.com/mod/mob-player-animator-neo) to work
